wolf-strategy.note: Our account — passive earning via strategy positions

recommendations.reason: M19 (prashantfb65) is rank 5 with 6.99% ROE, inside prize zone ($435.65 prize). Zero trades executed — position is passively earning. DO NOT touch this account. Week ends in ~21 hours.

trade_wife (M179642) has been at rank 14 with 0% ROE, 0 trades, $48.89 balance for the entire week. The autonomous-brain.json shows RISK_OFF with blockNewEntries=true and maxSlotsCap=0. The engine has not fired a single trade. 51% drawdown from peak triggered permanent RISK_OFF. This account is dead weight in the arena.

Rank 1 (paknayir) achieves 15.59% ROE via 414 ultra-high-frequency trades with ZERO tools — pure manual scalping. This suggests the winning meta is volume-heavy micro-trading on small balances ($910 starting → $1076). Our wolf-primary at $48 balance cannot replicate this pattern, but the insight is valuable for future weeks.

Rank 7 (Diegoxyz) achieves 5.67% ROE with only 6 trades on $2074 balance ($58,985 volume = ~$9,830 avg notional per trade). This is the conviction-hold archetype — few, high-conviction, large-size positions. This is closer to our wolf strategy's intended approach. Validates that low-frequency + high-conviction can win.

betashop runs 15+ agents. Only Pangolin (#6, 6.17%) and Cheetah (#9, 2.22%) are profitable. The rest are negative, including Polar (#25, -1.82%), Sentinel (#31, -6.10%), Vulture (#47, -31.37%). Syndicate diversification does NOT guarantee success — individual strategy quality matters more.

With only $48.89 in trade_wife, even a 20% ROE would yield $9.78 — not enough to compete. Either top up to $200+ and activate, or accept this account is a non-competitor and focus entirely on keeping prashantfb65 in the top 5.
